## Getting Started

Test $f(x) = \frac{1}{x}$

Test 2 $g(x)= 3f(x)$

Welcome! This website is designed to give you complete control over your learning. Every lesson features dynamic problems that change numbers every time you refresh or click a button, giving you infinite opportunities to practice.

::: {.callout-tip}
### How to use this site
1. Select a lesson from the top navigation bar.
2. Read the concept overview.
3. Use the interactive sliders to see how math graphs change in real-time.
4. Try the practice problems and type your answers into the check-boxes to test your understanding.
:::

---

## Quick Math Warm-Up

Test your mental math before diving into the lessons. Change the multiplier below to see how the sequence changes!
